app/runtime.js: Top-level application assembly and lifecycle legacy extraction boundary; browser entry remains a minimal bootstrap.
app/settings/controller.js: Lazy-loaded settings section controllers share modal routing and drag-order persistence during the staged split.
app/workspace/controller.js: Workspace facade still composes frame lifecycle, layout, drag, and menu behavior behind one lazy boundary.
content-src/content.js: Canonical content bridge behavior is kept in one esbuild entry while protocol and reusable Summary runtime are extracted.
content-src/message-navigator.js: Message Navigator site adapters are bundled together into one dynamically registered classic IIFE.
shared/topic-delete-userscript-sources.j: Build-time canonical Delete userscript templates generate standalone runtime assets and are deliberately excluded from packages.
